main.node: Call get ownership context from deed

Gemini Gem - Highest and Best Use1

body.previousContent: The subject property is located outside the corporate city limits of Odessa, Texas, and falls within the municipality's Extraterritorial Jurisdiction (ETJ). Consequently, the site is not assigned a specific zoning classification under the City of Odessa’s zoning ordinance. As an unzoned property within the ETJ, it is not subject to municipal restrictions regarding permitted uses, setbacks, or height limitations, though development must strictly adhere to Ector County subdivision regulations and applicable health and safety codes. The surrounding area exhibits a zoning pattern consistent with the subject, as the properties immediately adjacent to the west, east, north, and south are also situated within the ETJ and lack municipal zoning designations. The vicinity is predominantly characterized by a mix of light industrial and commercial service uses typical of the unzoned areas on the city's periphery.
body.regenerationContext: When discussing the surrounding areas, starting at the sentence 'The surrounding area exhibits a zoning pattern consistent',  please also add information about the fact that the property is 1 block (~1,000 feet) from the city limits and at the edge of the city limits is properties in the Heavy Commercial District-2 (HC code on the zoning map)
